mapper.select: SELECT t.*, s.common_name AS speciesName FROM tree t LEFT JOIN species s ON t.species_id = s.species_id WHERE t.plot_id = #{plotId}
SELECT t.*, s.common_name AS speciesName FROM tree t LEFT JOIN species s ON t.species_id = s.species_id WHERE t.tree_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tree (plot_id, species_id, tree_number, dbh, height, age, health_status) VALUES (#{plotId}, #{speciesId}, #{treeNumber}, #{dbh}, #{height}, #{age}, #{healthStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE tree SET plot_id = #{plotId}, species_id = #{speciesId}, tree_number = #{treeNumber}, dbh = #{dbh}, height = #{height}, age = #{age}, health_status = #{healthStatus} WHERE tree_id = #{treeId}
